holdings.n: Willis Towers Watson Public Limited Company

holdings.infoBox: BASV is an equity ETF with a total of 42 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dell Technologies stock at 4.60%, Flex Ltd. at 4.35%, Cardinal Health at 3.98%, Cash at 3.94%, and SLB N.V. at 3.66%.

overview.description: The Brown Advisory Sustainable Value ETF (BASV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation by actively managing a narrow portfolio of US large-cap stocks meeting both value and sustainability criteria established by the subadvisor. BASV was launched on Jun 13, 2025 and is issued by Brown Advisory.
